message:
README: replace stock SVG and ASCII diagram with custom illustrations

Two visual upgrades to the README hero section and architecture diagram:

1. Hero image: Replace the generic Wikimedia SQLite SVG logo
   (https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/38/SQLite370.svg)
   with the custom frankensqlite_illustration.webp. Uses the same
   <div align="center"> pattern as other projects (e.g., xf) for
   consistent GitHub rendering. The illustration is project-specific
   and visually communicates the key concepts (MVCC, page versioning,
   Frankenstein theme) at a glance.

2. Architecture diagram: Replace the 30-line ASCII art box-drawing
   diagram in the Architecture section with frankensqlite_diagram.webp
   rendered at width="512". The image version is more readable,
   correctly shows all 23 crates in their dependency layers, and
   renders consistently across all Markdown viewers (the ASCII art
   broke on narrow terminals and some mobile renderers). The detailed
   Crate Map table immediately below the image still provides the
   full textual reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
